description: On hit, you are healed HP equal to the target's Attack stat, then the target’s Attack is -2 for 10 mins. This effect cannot be stacked.

name: Struggle
description: Struggle is used if you can't use any other attacks. Struggle has no type. After use, you lose HP equal to 1/4th of your Max HP.

name: Struggle Bug
description: On hit, the target’s Special Attack is -1 for 10 mins. This effect cannot be stacked.

name: Stuff Cheeks
description: As a free action, consume your held Berry. Your Defense is +2 for 10 mins.

name: Stun Gas
description: Stun Gas has -2 during Accuracy Check. On hit, the target is Paralyzed.

name: Stun Spore
description: Stun Spore has -5 during Accuracy Check. On hit, the target is Paralyzed.

name: Stylish Spin
description: On hit, the target is Confused.

name: Submission
description: On hit, you lose HP equal to 1/4th of the damage you deal.

name: Substitute
description: Substitute is used as a Reaction. If you would be hit by an attack that would deal more than 1/6th of your Max HP in damage, use Substitute to instead ignore the damage and effects of the attack, but also lose HP equal to 1/6th of your Max HP.

name: Sucker Punch
description: Sucker Punch is used as a Reaction. When you are a target of a melee move, use Sucker Punch to attack the attacker before the enemy rolls their Accuracy Check against you. You must still roll an accuracy check for Sucker Punch.

name: Sunny Day
description: You create a circle of Sunny Weather with a 60ft diameter. Within the Sunny weather, Fire-type attacks deal an additional 8 damage and Water-type attacks deal 8 less damage. This weather disappears after 2 mins.

name: Sunsteel Strike
description: Sunsteel Strike has +2 during Accuracy Check.

name: Super Fang
description: On hit, the target’s current HP is halved.

name: Superpower
description: On hit, your Attack and Defense is -2 for 10 mins. This effect cannot be stacked.

name: Supersonic
description: Supersonic has -8 during Accuracy Check. On hit, the target is Confused.

name: Supersonic Skystrike
description: Immediately move next to your target, then roll your accuracy check.

name: Surging Strikes
description: Surging Strikes is a Scatter attack. It has three attacks. On hit, Surging Strikes always counts as a critical hit.

name: Swagger
description: On hit, the target is Confused and the target’s Attack is +4 until they are no longer Confused.

name: Swallow
description: Destroy up to 3 of your Coats of Stuff. For every Coat of Stuff you destroy, Swallow heals you 25 HP.

name: Sweet Kiss
description: Sweet Kiss has -4 during Accuracy Check. On hit, the target is Confused.

name: Sweet Scent
description: On hit, your next attack against the same target has +1 during Accuracy Check.

name: Swift
description: You can’t miss targets with less than 15 Special Defense.

name: Switcheroo
description: On hit, you and the target trade any held items. If only you or the target has an item, take or give the item to exchange who has possession of it.

name: Sync Move
description: You can’t miss targets with less than 15 Defense or Special Defense. Sync Move has no type which means it can’t be resisted and can’t be super-effective. However, if both participating attackers share a type, they may have Sync Move’s type be that type and be affected by weakness and resistance. Sync Move checks its accuracy against Defense or Special Defense, decided when declared as an attack. Sync Move’s attackers apply both Attack or both Special Attack modifiers to Sync Move’s damage. Sync Move takes up both attacker’s turns during that round of combat.

name: Synchronoise
description: Synchronoise can’t hit targets unless they share at least one type with you.

name: Synthesis
description: You are healed HP equal to half of your Max HP. If you are within Sunny Weather, you are healed HP equal to 3/4ths of your Max HP instead.

name: Syrup Bomb
description: On hit, the target’s Speed is -1 for 10 mins. This effect cannot be stacked.

name: Tachyon Cutter
description: Tachyon Cutter cannot miss and does not need a line of sight to target if you are in Electrified terrain.

name: Tackle
description: A full-body charge attack.

name: Tail Slap
description: Tail Slap has -2 during Accuracy Check. Tail Slap is a Scatter attack. Up to 5 attacks.

name: Take Down
description: On hit, you lose HP equal to 1/4th of the damage you deal.

name: Tar Shot
description: Put a Tar Coat on the target. The Coat has the following ability: Your Speed is -2. If you are hit by a Fire-type attack, you take +8 damage. This Coat lasts for 2 mins.

name: Taunt
description: On hit, the target may only use attacks that target you or your allies for 1 min.

name: Tea Time
description: Any target holding a Berry immediately consumes it.

name: Techno Blast
description: Techno Blast’s type can be changed to Ice, Electric, Fire, or Water when used.

name: Teeter Dance
description: On hit, all targets are Confused.

name: Teleport
description: Teleport may be used a Reaction. Teleport moves you up to 50ft away in your line of sight. If an enemy would hit you with a move that deals damage, use Teleport as a Reaction to move up to 50ft away in your line of sight and take only 1/4 the damage you would have taken from the attack.

name: Ten Million Volt Thunderbolt
description: On hit, the target is Paralyzed.

name: Tera Blast
description: Tera Blast’s type changes to match your type. When you use Tera Blast, you may use your Attack stat instead of your Special Attack stat when rolling to hit and calculating damage instead.

name: Terrain Pulse
description: If used in the area of a Terrain move, Terrain Pulse has 5d8 for damage instead and its type changes to match the terrain.

name: Thief
description: On hit, steals the target’s held item, if any.

name: Thousand Arrows
description: Thousand Arrows ignores any Ground-type immunities.

name: Thousand Waves
description: On hit, all targets are bound to the ground for 10 mins. Thousand Waves ignores any Ground-type immunities.

name: Thrash
description: Thrash is a two turn move. On each turn, move to the closest character within 25 ft that you can reach, and roll this move’s Accuracy Check and damage against them.

name: Throat Chop
description: On hit, the target may not use attacks or abilities that require the use of the target's voice.

name: Thunder
description: Thunder has -2 during Accuracy Check unless it’s Raining. On hit, if you got 14 or higher on Accuracy Check, the targets are Paralyzed.

name: Thunder Cage
description: On hit, all targets are bound to ground for 1d4 turns. For each turn the target is bound, it takes 1d6 damage.

name: Thunder Fang
description: On hit, if you got 18 or higher on Accuracy Check, the target is randomly either Stunned or Paralyzed.

name: Thunder Punch
description: On hit, if you got 17 or higher on Accuracy Check, the target is Paralyzed.

name: Thunder Shock
description: On hit, if you got 18 or higher on Accuracy Check, the target is Paralyzed.

name: Thunder Wave
description: On hit, the target is Paralyzed.

name: Thunderbolt
description: On hit, if you got 18 or higher on Accuracy Check, the target is Paralyzed.

name: Thunderclap
description: Thunderclap has Priority in Sunny Weather.

name: Thunderous Kick
description: On hit, the target’s Defense is -1 for 10 mins. This effect cannot be stacked.

name: Tidepools
description: You create a circle of Tide Terrain with a 60ft diameter. Pokémon with the skill Flopper or Beached ignore those skills while acting within Tide Terrain. Tide Terrain does not replace other Terrains nor does it get replaced by other Terrains. This terrain disappears after 5 mins.

name: Tidy Up
description: Any Hazards or Coats within range are destroyed. If you destroyed any Hazards or Coats, your Attack is +1 and your Speed is +1 for 10 mins.

name: Tireless Teleport
description: Tireless Teleport is used as a Reaction. If you are hit by an attack, move up to 50ft away in your line of sight. Take only 1/4th the damage you would have taken from the attack.

name: Torch Song
description: On hit, your Special Attack is +2 for 10 mins.

name: Totem Memory
description: All allies (up to 10 including yourself) within range of Totem Memory have their Attack or Special Attack raised +2 for 10 mins.

name: Totemic Call
description: If you have 2 or more allies with you in combat, Totemic Call fails. Summon 1d4 allies to the encounter. The allies who show up have their Attack and Special Attack raised 2 for 10 mins.

name: Totemic Guardian
description: All allies (up to 10 including yourself) within range of Totemic Guardian are healed HP equal to the amount of damage Totemic Guardian would have dealt.

name: Totemic Power
description: All allies (up to 10 including yourself) within range of Totemic Power have their Attack and Special Attack raised +2 for 10 mins. Totemic Power can stack.

name: Toxic
description: Toxic has -3 during Accuracy Check, unless the user is Poison type. On hit, the target is Toxified.

name: Toxic Spikes
description: Place the Toxic Spikes Hazard in the area surrounding you. Toxic Spikes Hazard has the following ability: When a foe moves through Toxic Spikes Hazard during their turn and are on the ground, they are Poisoned. If the Toxic Spikes Hazard has multiple layers, it will Toxify foes instead of Poisoning them instead. This Hazard disappears after 2 mins.

name: Toxic Thread
description: On hit, the target is Poisoned and the target’s Speed is -1 until they are no longer Poisoned.

name: Trailblaze
description: On hit, your Speed is +1 for 10 mins.

name: Transform
description: You transform into a copy of the target changing all of your stats except for HP. You copy its stats, skills, and passives. You can use any of the target’s moves. While transformed, you lose access to your regular moves, skills, passives, and biology. Except for stats, this information is not provided to you. Transform may not target Legendary Pokémon. Transform lasts for 2 hours or until Ditto chooses to change back as an action. Transform fails if used by anything but a Ditto.

name: Tri Attack
description: On hit, if you got 17 or higher on Accuracy Check, the target is randomly either Paralyzed, Burned, or Frozen.

name: Trick
description: On hit, you and the target trade any held items. If only you or the target has an item, take or give the item to exchange who has possession of it.

name: Trick Or Treat
description: On hit, put a Treat Coat on the target. The Coat has the following ability: You lose your current Types and become only Ghost-type for 10 mins.

name: Trick Room
description: You create a circle of Tricky Terrain with a 60ft diameter. Within the Tricky terrain, turn orders are reversed during each round. If some are outside of Tricky terrain while others are within Tricky terrain, all actions are still made in reverse order. This terrain disappears after 2 mins.

name: Triple Arrows
description: Triple Arrows is a Scatter attack. Up to 3 attacks. Triple Arrow's third attack on hit deals an additional 1d12 damage. On hit, any target's Defense is -1 for 10 mins. This effect cannot be stacked.

name: Triple Axel
description: Triple Axel is a Scatter attack. Up to 3 attacks. Triple Axel’s last attack on hit deals an additional 1d12 damage.

name: Triple Dive
description: 1d20. Triple Dive is a Scatter attack. Up to 3 attacks. Triple Dive’s third attack on hit deals an additional 1d12 damage.

name: Triple Kick
description: Triple Kick is a Scatter attack. Up to 3 attacks. Triple Kick’s last attack on hit deals an additional 1d12 damage.

name: Trop Kick
description: On hit, the target’s Attack is -1 for 10 mins. This effect cannot be stacked.

name: Twin Beam
description: Twin Beam is a Scatter attack. It has two attacks.

name: Twineedle
description: Twineedle is a Scatter attack. It has two attacks. On either hit, if you got 14 or higher on Accuracy Check, the target is Poisoned.

name: Twinkle Tackle
description: Immediately move next to your target, then roll your accuracy check.

name: Twister
description: On hit, if you got 18 or higher on Accuracy Check, the target is Stunned.

name: Type Flash
description: On hit, your Special Attack is +1 for 10 mins. This effect cannot be stacked.

name: Type Smasher
description: On hit, your Attack is +1 for 10 mins. This effect cannot be stacked.

name: Unbreakable Armor
description: Your Defense is +4 for 10 mins, your Attack and Special Attack is -10 for 10 mins. This effect cannot be stacked.

name: Unbreakable Barrier
description: Your Special Defense is +4 for 10 mins, your Attack and Special Attack is -10 for 10 mins. This effect cannot be stacked.

name: Uproar
description: You may move, but then must use Uproar for two more consecutive rounds. Sleeping Pokémon within range of Uproar are awoken and Pokémon cannot go to Sleep within Uproar's range.

name: V Create
description: No description available.

name: Vacuum Wave
description: Vacuum Wave has Priority.

name: Venom Drench
description: Venom Drench can only target a Poisoned or Toxified enemy. On hit, the target’s Attack, Special Attack, and Speed are -3 for 10 mins. This effect cannot be stacked.

name: Venoshock
description: If the target is Poisoned or Toxified, Venoshock has 4d10 for damage instead.

name: Vicious Insult
description: Unless you’ve spent at least 10 mins with the target, Vicious Insult has -4 during accuracy check. On hit, the target is stunned. On hit, during the target’s next 3 turns it must succeed a confidence check by rolling 11 or greater on 1d20+any one of their modifiers or be stunned again.

name: Victory Dance
description: Your Attack, Special Attack, Defense, and Special Defense are all +2 for 5 mins.

name: Vital Throw
description: You can’t miss targets with less than 15 Defense if the target already acted this round. On hit, move the target away from you 15ft.

name: Void Fury
description: On hit, your Defense and Special Defense is -2 for 10 mins. This effect cannot be stacked.

name: Volcanic Devastation
description: Volcanic Devastation counts as both a Water and Fire type move for effectiveness. When you use this attack you immediately end your turn. During your next turn, you can't act. On the round after that, when it's your turn roll Volcanic Devastation's Accuracy Check and damage. Set your HP to -300% HP and you must make three death savings throws.

name: Volt Tackle
description: On hit, you lose HP equal to 1/3rd of the damage you deal and if you got 18 or higher on Accuracy Check, the target is Paralyzed.

name: Wake Up Slap
description: If Wake-Up Slap is used against a Sleeping target, Wake-Up Slap deals 5d8 for damage instead, then cures the target of Sleep. If you choose not to roll damage while using Wake-Up Slap, you do not need to roll an Accuracy Check.

name: Water Pulse
description: On hit, if you got 16 or higher on Accuracy Check, the target is Confused.

name: Water Shuriken
description: Water Shuriken has Priority and is a Scatter attack. Up to 5 attacks.

name: Water Sport
description: Put a Water Coat on the target or yourself. The Coat has the following ability: Reduce damage from Fire attacks that hit you by 10. This Coat lasts for 2 mins.

name: Water Spout
description: If you are at Max HP, Water Spout has 5d12 for damage instead.

name: Waterfall
description: On hit, if you got 16 or higher on Accuracy Check, the target is Stunned.

name: Wave Crash
description: On hit, you lose HP equal to 1/4th of the damage you deal. Your speed is +2 for 10 mins. This effect cannot be stacked.

name: Weather Ball
description: If within weather, Weather Ball has 5d8 for damage instead and its type changes to match the weather.

name: Whirling Kinesis
description: On hit, the target’s Accuracy Checks are -3 during their next turn. This effect cannot be stacked.

name: Whirlpool
description: On hit, the target is bound in place for 1d4 rounds. For each round the target is bound, it takes 1d4 damage on its turns.

name: Whirlwind
description: On hit, moves the target 60ft away.

name: Wicked Blow
description: On hit, Wicked Blow always counts as a critical hit.

name: Wild Charge
description: On hit, you lose HP equal to 1/4th of the damage you deal.

name: Will O Wisp
description: On hit, the target is Burned.

name: Wish
description: Target an ally or yourself. After the target acts during the next round, they are healed HP equal to half of the target’s Max HP.

name: Wonder Room
description: You create a circle of Wonderful Terrain with a 60ft diameter. Anyone who attacks within the Wonderful terrain makes Attack Accuracy Checks against Special Defense and Special Attack Accuracy Checks against Defense. This terrain disappears after 2 mins.

name: Wood Hammer
description: On hit, you lose HP equal to 1/3rd of the damage you deal.

name: Wrap
description: On hit, the target is bound to you for 1d4 rounds. For each round the target is bound, it takes 1d4 damage on its turns.

name: X Scissor
description: The user slashes at the target by crossing its scythes or claws as if they were a pair of scissors.

name: Yawn
description: On hit, the target falls Asleep after its next turn.

name: Zap Cannon
description: Zap Cannon has -5 during Accuracy Check. On hit the target is Paralyzed.

name: Zen Headbutt
description: On hit, if you got 18 or higher on Accuracy Check, the target is Stunned.

name: Zing Zap
description: On hit, if you got 18 or higher on Accuracy Check, the target is Stunned.
